en: You may have got your heart broken a few times.
ko: 과거에 몇 번 마음이 아팠을 수도 있어.

en: In the past, it never lasts as strong as it used to.
It don't feel as good as it used to, but boy.
ko: 예전만큼 좋게 느껴지지 않지만, 네가 했던 모든 말들과 했던 모든 행동들.

en: And all the things you used to say, things you used to do.
Ooh, no more will you be the one.
ko: 더 이상 너는 그 사람이 아닐 거야.

en: That's what you tell everyone around you.
But you know they've heard it all before.
ko: 하지만 그들은 다 들어본 말이라는 거 알잖아.
더 무슨 말을 할 수 있겠어?

en: Well, love won't let you walk away.
ko: 사랑은 너를 떠나게 내버려 두지 않아.

en: And you can't help who you love.
And you find yourself giving it all away.
ko: 네가 충분하다고 생각할 때 모든 걸 주고 있는 자신을 발견하게 돼.

en: When you think you're enough, ooh, cause.
I wanna be the one who you believe in.
Your heart is in front of me.
There's a piece of me who leaves when you're gone.
ko: 네가 떠나면 내 일부도 함께 떠나.

en: I wanna be the one who you believe in.
Your heart is in front of me.
